info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud FaRui proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud FaRui API

post.description: This operation generates contract review results using a Large Language Model (LLM) to identify findings, highlight risk items, and suggest revisions.

parameters.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio workspace ID
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio workspace ID

riskLevel.description: Risk level of the rule. Valid values: high, medium, low

ruleDesc.example: 所有涉及法律引用的合同条款，包括但不限于合同的管辖法律、争议解决机制、合规要求、特定行业法规以及其他法律义务和权利的引用。

position.description: Review position. Valid values: 0 (neutral), 1 (Party A), 2 (Party B)

ruleTaskId.description: Task ID for generating review rules

rules.description: List of rules generated by the model. At least one rule must be present.

items.description: Rule object. At least one rule object must be present.

riskLevel.description: Risk level of the rule. Valid values: high, medium, low

ruleTag.example: 审查通用条款的常见风险

ruleTitle.example: 审查该合同免责条款中，法定免责情形审查相关的风险。

Message.description: Detailed error message when the request fails.

examineBrief.example: 合同中未明确法定免责条款，尤其是不可抗力的定义和后果，可能在发生不可抗力事件时导致双方权益不明，因此需要进行补充

riskLevel.description: Risk level of the rule. Valid values: high, medium, low

ruleSequence.description: Rule sequence number for this review result

ruleTag.description: Rule tag for this review result
ruleTag.example: 审查通用条款的常见风险

ruleTitle.description: Rule title for this review result
ruleTitle.example: 审查该合同免责条款中，法定免责情形审查相关的风险。

subRisks.description: Risk sub-items in the review result

originalContent.description: Original contract text for this risk item

resultContent.example: 14.1 不可抗力条款14.1.1 不可抗力定义：指在本协议签署后发生的、本协议签署时不能预见的、其发生与后果是无法避免或克服的、妨碍任何一方全部或部分履约的所有事件。上述事件包括但不限于地震、台风、洪水、火灾、战争、国际或国内运输中断、流行病、罢工，以及根据中国法律或一般国际商业惯例认作不可抗力的其他事件。14.1.2 不可抗力的后果：14.1.2.1 如果发生不可抗力事件，影响一方履行其在本协议项下的义务，则在不可抗力造成的延误期内中止履行，而不视为违约。14.1.2.2 宣称发生不可抗力的一方应迅速书面通知其他各方，并在其后的十五(15)天内提供证明不可抗力发生及其持续时间的足够证据。14.1.2.3 如果发生不可抗力事件，各方应立即互相协商，以找到公平的解决办法，并且应尽一切合理努力将不可抗力的影响减少到最低限度。14.1.2.4 金钱债务的迟延责任不得因不可抗力而免除。14.1.2.5 迟延履行期间发生的不可抗力不具有免责效力。

resultType.description: Recommended action for this risk item. Valid values: Revise required, Delete required, Add required, Pass

riskBrief.example: 未定义不可抗力及其后果，可能导致在发生不可抗力时，双方权益无法得到保障

riskExplain.example: 未明确法定免责情形—不可抗力

standardOriginalContent.description: This field appears only in contract comparison mode

resultTaskId.description: Task ID for generating review results

RequestId.description: A unique identifier generated by Alibaba Cloud for this request.

Success.description: Indicates whether the operation succeeded. Valid values: true (succeeded), false (failed)

parameters.description: The ID of the workspace in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: The ID of the workspace in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.

extra.description: Settings related to deep thinking. If this parameter is not specified, the response format of the previous version is used.

deepThink.description: Specifies whether to enable deep thinking.

onlineSearch.description: Specifies whether to perform an online search.

stream.description: Specifies whether the request is a streaming request.

content.example: 朋友借了我10万块钱，约定两个月归还且不需要利息。已经半年过去了但他一直没有还，我可以要求增加利息吗？

Message.description: If the request is abnormal, a specific error message is returned.

RequestId.description: The unique identifier generated by Alibaba Cloud for the request.

ResponseMarkdown.description: The response content. This is returned for non-deep thinking requests.
ResponseMarkdown.example: 在您与朋友之间的借贷关系中，具体的计算方法可以参照一年期贷款市场报价利率（LPR）或根据公平原则和诚实信用原则确定。如协商不成，您可以通过法律诉讼途径维护自己的权益。在行动前，建议咨询专业法律人士以获取更具体的法律建议。

Success.description: Indicates whether the call was successful. \`true\`: The call was successful. \`false\`: The call failed.

InputTokens.description: The number of tokens used for the input.

OutputTokens.description: The number of tokens used for the output.

TotalTokens.description: The total number of tokens used for this call.

contents.description: The deep thinking response consists of three parts, each identified by the type field. The type=deepThink part contains the deep thinking results. The type=text part contains the answer. The type=referenceList part contains references such as case law, regulations, and online resources. These references include caseList (cases), lawList (regulations), and searchList (online resources, available only when the online search feature is enabled).
contents.example: [{"id":"50b231e343f348209023259575cf5be7","contentType":"deepThink","content":"好的，用户问的是在社交媒体上发布他人照片需要注意哪些法律风险。首先，我需要回顾法睿提供的资料，看看相关的法律条文和案例。\n\n首先想到的是民法典里的肖像权规定，","status":"stop"},{"searchList":[],"lawList":[{"lawId":"f6a8ac8d16677fe501ccabd235d77229","lawItemId":"8a838a988a5ec2aee647e7296a602966"}","caseList":["（2020）湘0281民初3082号"},{"id":"50b231e343f348209023259575cf5be7","contentType":"text","content":"在社交媒体上发布他人照片需注意以下法律风险及应对措施，。","status":"正在为您生成回答..."}]

extra.description: The search type information entered by the user.

post.description: This operation retrieves relevant cases based on a user’s problem description. The system uses a Large Language Model (LLM) to parse the input, generate search conditions, and identify matching cases.

parameters.description: The ID of the workspace in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: The ID of the workspace in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio.

caseNo.description: The case number of the legal document.

caseTitle.description: The title of the legal document.
caseTitle.example: 杨怀平、广州市公安局越秀区分局公安行政管理:其他(公安)二审行政判决书

pageSize.description: The number of entries per page. The default is 10. The maximum is 200.

query.example: 9月19日，执行“和谐使命-2023”任务的海军“和平方舟”号医院船返回舟山到访基里巴斯、汤加、瓦努阿图、所罗门群岛、东帝汶等5国，诊疗民众多少人次？

referLevel.description: The case type. Valid values are \`Other\`, \`Reference\`, and \`Guiding\`. The default is \`Other\` (ordinary case).

content.example: 朋友借了我10万块钱，约定两个月归还且不需要利息。已经半年过去了但他一直没有还，我可以要求增加利息吗？

caseResult.description: This field indicates the result of the operation. If the operation succeeds, the value is success. If it fails, the value is an error code description. For more information, see the API error codes.

items.description: This field indicates the setting result. If the setting is successful, its value is 'success'. Otherwise, it contains an error code description. For more information, see the error codes for this API.

appliedLaws.description: The legal basis and applied laws.

caseBasic.description: The basic facts of the case.

closeCaseCause.description: The cause for closing the case.

disputeFocusTag.description: Paragraphs about the focus of the dispute.

items.description: A paragraph about the focus of the dispute.

openCaseCause.description: The cause for filing the case.

preTrialProcess.description: The details of the original trial.

refereeGist.description: The key points of the judgment.

sourceContent.description: The main text of the document.

commonLevel.description: The level of the trial court.

name.example: 遵义市播州区人民法院

pageSize.description: The number of entries displayed per page.

query.description: The name of the field to filter by.
query.example: 行政机关违反法定程序作出的行政处罚是否应被撤销的案例

totalCount.description: The total number of returned results.

success.description: Indicates whether the call was successful.

post.description: This operation retrieves relevant regulations that match a user’s input. After you submit a question, a Large Language Model (LLM) analyzes it and retrieves the corresponding regulatory provisions.

parameters.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio workspace ID
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio workspace ID

pageSize.description: Page size. Default is 10. Maximum is 200.

content.example: 朋友借了我10万块钱，约定两个月归还且不需要利息。已经半年过去了但他一直没有还，我可以要求增加利息吗？

abolitionBasis.example: [{\"lawId\":\"chl542s333.txt\",\"times\":\"20170309\",\"lawName\":\"最高人民法院关于实施修订后的《关于常见犯罪的量刑指导意见》的通知\"}]"

lawName.example: 最高人民法院关于常见犯罪的量刑指导意见

lawSourceContent.description: Full text of the law or regulation

lawTitle.example: 最高人民法院关于常见犯罪的量刑指导意见第二百六十三条

releaseYearMonthDate.description: Sort order for release date: desc or asc

similarity.description: Sort order for similarity: desc or asc

message.example: 系统错误（接口正常为空）

success.description: true if the operation succeeded. false if it failed.

post.description: This API extracts specified fields from contract content. You provide a contract URL and a list of fields to extract, and the service returns the extracted field values.

parameters.description: Workspace ID in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: Workspace ID in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio

desc.description: Description of the field to extract
desc.example: 当金额类型为收入或支出时可选其一

extractItem.description: Name of the field to extract

option.description: Fixed enumeration values for the field

fileOssUrl.description: Publicly accessible OSS URL of the file

contractText.example: 甲方与乙方签署的技术服务合作协议...

desc.example: 合同唯一标识编号，格式如 HT-YYYY-XXXXX

option.description: Fixed enumeration value of the extracted field

originalText.description: Original text of the extracted field
